textByHash.02ce2c18173daeaaf99d40e1728d1c50f8161d1f: Looks like you're just the man for the job! Welcome aboard!
textByHash.0476f898d3f3d35fc8257378076d620a6aefa646: Well, the zombies holed up in the main monastery must have at least one set of those items; otherwise, how did they perform the operation in the first place?
textByHash.04d732c2059208dfc9baa3ccc22aa471f3482e97: I know...I think that my time here will be well spent trying to atone for what I did.
textByHash.05a34abe9f303f06599b0fdbc716dfc90093aa52: Well, that's a nice crate, but unless you want me to sit under a layer of (heh heh) cats, I think it'll need a false bottom.
textByHash.0c5e43de719a363b85bb2a746a42d2dec3a2072f: Well, that's all of the items I'll need to get this situation fixed up.
textByHash.1109866bc532476592691e5050f9d0511bdbd8d7: Blow your whistle and I'll get in the crate while we wait.
textByHash.1206224a6911f825579a5a32886a755f35350278: Why did you have to pick Rologarth's brain of all brains?!?
textByHash.126874e7234d970b7c789c152e3b92b5df17c5f2: Very good, you have made a new conductor - now get up on the roof and repair it before this storm passes!
textByHash.17f29cc0aa5dabf85d4400fb2db52f911b6c3b0d: Hmm, their sense of smell is quite acute, so no disguise would work. And I have a slight...reaction...to teleporting.
textByHash.18f1455d8eacf7810140293b8c3cd7a9bbdbaeda: Well, he occasionally delivers meat to clients if they are too far away to come and get it themselves. If I were inside a crate of meat then he'd be unable to smell me and you'd be able to get me past.
textByHash.1ad92b000065c93caf02b84cf75cc499083691b2: ...And who knows what problems will come up if we have an undead head on a truly dead body.
textByHash.24ab5a64b3898166ac39a986c000706fe3e8564a: I have been talking with some of the monks. They do seem to be rather intelligent for members of the clergy.
textByHash.2a4aac2519ab26b2119eec8e858c1c75bcb6f45c: Could you please keep notes of what I do, for posterity?
textByHash.2af95ee59f62c13970e4f067dbf30780a16d40ca: Pah, you have no stomach for science.
textByHash.2b072b94c781d19ae1963cfeeffcfbc39415db32: [laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh]! Oh, it's so apt, I can't stop laughing!
textByHash.35b7a571e5a852142ed995a1dab0ab95b711aad2: However, I am going to need a few things.
textByHash.3adb65e2979706e9b23290afcda71ca54f8ea104: I'm sure as soon as their headaches fade, they will want to talk to you.
textByHash.3afab277e6e8c5207a4d6f4e2c26991c4445ce81: Aside from that, I seem to have arrived in one piece. I apologise for not believing you earlier. Brother Tranquility has told me the full story and I am prepared to help.
textByHash.42328b69c4f01bc0d64d5233b229fd624697ad1d: After talking with these monks and seeing your efforts to save them...I'm starting to regret my past actions.
textByHash.4327afccf992350e6d1682ab568a7794cc8e55f7: Let us get this operation started. I'll begin by using the...
textByHash.45c33f4a97e03d6a7881afdc426aa1fa37191927: Silence your insolent tongue! The storm that brews overhead will create the lightning. What I need you to do is to repair the lightning conductor on the balcony above.
textByHash.46dec98052c9c4774fc288bb00a43ee850e78a66: Excellent, this will come in handy.
textByHash.47509e6b9fe1e59ac238907e7fb875d25d793335: I need you to find some...stuff...for me.
textByHash.49dd8b2229287a2e55c574ce771c4fba2c76699a: Yes, there is. You're highly skilled at grave-digging, yes?
textByHash.4c23d1907134c4eabef37f1fcfb22a773631275e: Anything, anything. I will do anything to escape the wolves!
textByHash.4d681a513629bbd68855138e1e54dfff092cd615: I'll have to ask you some questions first.
textByHash.5147c63e74ff36933c057c13d6719026e8fdb381: Now, why not follow them upstairs while I clean up.
textByHash.542c8831da0ecb98bb2c71407c23d40e1760a52f: Remember this, : my experiment will only work with a conductor made from silver.
textByHash.5670cb22461c77270a5e88c8a4bcf0d3c5e0ffbb: Well, if you are, do it in a bucket. This is a sterile environment, after all.
textByHash.593a38615564e24dcb0185f2b9da4010be53da92: I will need a cranial clamp, a pair of brain tongs, three bell jars and at least thirty skull staples.
textByHash.5ad445fe6aa96db73726bdc80d8cb0ddc5a7f6b1: Now all you have to do is go and get all your little kitty friends!
textByHash.606c89735fb60887bea84bd183251b6b7c10744b: Excellent, you've brought me some legs.
textByHash.624fdd26f47320f819b8bb1c146cb2fd682d7400: Yes, I'm afraid it did, LogWarden - all too well.
textByHash.63e9ac8c828faa1a78fb9b9e743d4f54c41c9926: Well, on the plus side, there was plenty of water to clean my clothing with afterwards...
textByHash.673c2f809fb7e9d39f3e74ae539aa9a1c7baae46: Thank you for helping me see the error of my ways.
textByHash.6967998a68793c11cfb11829d61343db5d0be2e4: So how is the plan progressing?
textByHash.6a4dcbce285deb8f8bbb524ff8e9bccbc74729a2: Well, regardless, everything seems to be ready for you to call Rufus.
textByHash.70c0012ebfec1909abe900ba515c02b02df07f47: Well, I don't know...if you were a werewolf, I can see you would strike him as THAT sort of person.
textByHash.70f61642277da27bace4101b435141b308631922: I need you to get me enough dead body parts for me to stitch together a complete body, which I plan to bring to life.
textByHash.7872274ef916b8f598471c3c2696fa20bc020d5f: There is also a mausoleum on an island west of this castle. I expect the bodies that are buried there to be extremely well preserved, as they were wealthy in life.
textByHash.820c5490dc75ef763e3474920b3c212a082ee4ed: Oh, it's nothing to worry about.
textByHash.8487536e0f32ca77fb9441d55a864bb2c3d965c2: Go and get me a needle, and I'll need 5 lots of thread.
textByHash.8907db393d9655e3a2eba9a6d5da66120a8ae195: No, my friend. I have a very special purpose in mind for this creature.
textByHash.8aeb403227bb66be23471f30a050a124c770277e: The soil of Morytania is unique in its ability to preserve the bodies of the dead, which is one reason why I have chosen to carry out my experiments here.
textByHash.8af4cac28382292249248e473d2a030ea658a238: And my medical practice was my living. The corpses thing was just a hobby.
textByHash.8d963f97ec3d23711b0c3de924f55294fa054adc: Oh, perfectly innocent experiments - for the good of mankind.
textByHash.8f038210a73e2a0d52c7fa4798bda57024083fef: Just one more question. What would you say is your greatest skill?
textByHash.91b0e635b1cddd6b41f4683f46f7cb7816600840: Have you come to apply for the job?
textByHash.920d6034bb910ffacbfc34986c805e6360795b4f: Oh, it would be easier to do it myself! If you find a conductor mould you should be able to cast a new one.
textByHash.939a893a53e688ea15fc8ec9b70c07bdb9d93fd0: I see...and how long have you been hearing these 'monks' talking to you?
textByHash.97aa03ad51bb0a446fb8ec33d8bec663ebbe4ce8: That won't work. Apparently they have sealed off that passage. The monks heard some explosions and saw the zombies moving something off the ship.
textByHash.97e6078876a471a839f786784b618b5968c07d97: Are they here yet? I can hear them...howling!
textByHash.9bbd082debedefd95117cebe6270ba1fd4ad87ba: Where are my needle and thread?
textByHash.a5c71aa3d68297748e1ea71965a9e2bff15cae69: It seems they found the passage as they did a little interior rearranging.
textByHash.a6c732ea9a846a2f6aa918c177c91432c4407b8f: If that thing keeps wriggling around, I'll never get the stitches straight.
textByHash.b2d80aeeb816d845cc9e5e5a1fc6b9da5f811f90: Great, you've brought me some arms.
textByHash.b58ee7598c2cf27b2845f3e74d1aee53b6008bce: Well, it'll be a tight fit, but I'm sure I'll be able to squeeze in.
textByHash.b6c80781491679d704f2572a1ed6b7b7749511b6: What do you think you're doing?
textByHash.bbc1bd43d1b7b50e061cf081b72b36c9f7f914af: I recommend digging up some graves in the local area. To the south-east you will find the Haunted Woods; I believe there are many graves there.
textByHash.bc1390675472d372e04cb4067320d3f4416d21e8: Hmm, sounds like an offer I'd have to be really mad to refuse...
textByHash.be7425c5e572c422819723dd00f9de7f27190b5c: I told you I reacted badly to teleportation!
textByHash.beab601aa752e73875af55601a7898dee90af1c4: When you have all the equipment I asked for, come and see me so we can begin the procedure.
textByHash.c14c19ca245349943b23b58084280bc68b5076b9: How would you describe yourself in one word?
textByHash.c1fdfda44c4a414c9d3383c6bf46997d99b696e4: No!! I refuse to release you!! You must help me build another creature to destroy this dreadful mistake!!
textByHash.c67dc60b571c34b43f7a0caa1e0676d2adaeffe7: Hah, only if you can walk through wood! They sealed it with planks.
textByHash.c89b1dc95578a6ee1d5cc285ad660042947ec148: Destroy it!!! Take the key to the Tower and take back the life I never should have granted!!!
textByHash.c8d9ac2078af5af022034baf5985cefad6bfdfb6: Enough questions, now. Get back to your work.
textByHash.ca9163205f317dfa60e595bff2ca791bbaee4a5a: Fantastic, you've brought me a head.
textByHash.cd04aa063af201c8c9d29528e87b95abb67f9186: Well, you certainly seem to know what you are doing when it comes to rounding up cats. You must get a lot of practice!
textByHash.ce14d421c3f80cd58cf0dd61ddb3048e467d8202: Nothing you need to worry about.
textByHash.cedc70193fa3c653ec481c1127d501f95187812e: I'm sorry, but I don't think you have the aptitude for this position.
textByHash.d7f17f30cf775e40a288c02f8fc4724d9e15aebb: Bring me another head, one that isn't still moving
textByHash.d9f6812cb0408b9e2eddfe8829f9cc8b101893d4: Looks like you're just the woman for the job! Welcome aboard!
textByHash.db733b5d023048dae37b7dc6626b6cb7e3a1cadb: Wonderful...and they even have easy-grip handles, too.
textByHash.dc9d30193b35cc9337aad16ff5eeb8df24a95593: I have honed to perfection an ancient ritual that will give life to this creature, but for this I must harness the very power of Nature.
textByHash.dcf8d2cef5595efade1d6069a569215ac140ed6f: Did you come here to ask me something or just to insult me?
textByHash.e46238614e080a3b60f94858768586e034b9076f: Perfect. But I need one more thing from you - flesh and bones by themselves do not make life.
textByHash.e66b33ef0981da090b00af8a6fe042d978d623d3: It's exactly this style of jar that I need, thank you.
textByHash.e881e957588c5ae1229d1552c40b17a1f681a6ad: Only a little, and the sawdust scraped right off with that cheese grater.
textByHash.e940e036c90a40697daab856446597e8624b20cc: Splendid, you've brought me a torso.
textByHash.ebb50003161c60590243cf4f54c82052fd5ea806: I mean, you have to admit that this is a little...unlikely a scenario.
textByHash.edcc4e64b5436492f1f3e441873abef2f6c53ae3: I came to the land of Morytania many years ago, to find a safe sanctuary for my experiments. This abandoned castle suited my purposes exactly.
textByHash.ee685dbbbc836e450132e2113c3589917c411330: I have no control over it! It's coming to get me!
textByHash.ef262b23eae2c38ba8a505cd1dcd714ab7e716c7: Superb!! Those are all the parts I need. Now to sew them together ...
textByHash.f06c8d3581f261bfdd863e82948a8266167766d1: Very nice. Although, a sterilised one would be better.
textByHash.f08d26e20531e668231335c11df9927e22429266: The ones with brains, that is.
textByHash.f31f3e7c190fe9d5a88546cfa91940c664ee7b7b: I tricked it into going up to the Tower, and there it remains, imprisoned.
textByHash.f3543dc7aff03cffb868aa1c1ab607a30439d29d: Cats? He thought you were shipping cats?
textByHash.f971e15b441f9e87850d0d2349c1996ef5f61e68: Oh my, oh my, this is exactly what I feared!
textByHash.faf8294a6c93bc6c56b1cf957a36020b3946b90e: Wait... Rufus might be able to help.
textByHash.fd32b399de50d91687a3393c620d09d141ad84b7: I accept, but you'll have to get me past those werewolves.
textByHash.ff2916426c05f9e5495d202c6a2bee19f94402a3: What do you think you're doing???
